---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected on hardware or in firmware
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Hardware Setup
- **MCU / Board**: (e.g. STM32F446ZE on custom PCB, Nucleo-F407)
- **Firmware version / tag**: (e.g. v1.2, or commit hash)
- **Connected peripherals**: (e.g. BNO055 via I2C, ODrive over UART)

## To Reproduce
Steps to trigger the bug:
1. Power on with...
2. Send command / trigger event...
3. Observe...

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any serial monitor output, oscilloscope readings, or error codes if available.

## Possible Cause
Your hypothesis (even if uncertain). What did you last change before this appeared?

## Additional Context
- Schematic snippet, photo, or wiring notes if relevant
- Does it happen every time, or intermittently?
- Does it happen at specific speeds, temperatures, or load conditions?
